utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now, checking the final package: (1) destination - fully specified (city, country). (2) travel_dates - fully specified (departure and return dates). (3) transportation - includes flight details (type, class, airline type, cost, currency). (4) accommodation - fully specified (name, type, rating, nights, price, currency, amenities, location, check-in/check-out). (5) activities - listed with provider and eco details but missing per-activity costs (the format explicitly asks for selected activities with costs, so not fully specified). (6) additional_services - includes service_fees and cancellation_policy but lacks detailed costs for multiple services (still minimally covers cost info, partially acceptable but not fully detailed). (7) total_budget - includes total_cost, currency, and breakdown, fully specified. Hence, 6 items are fully covered (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, additional_services, total_budget), while activities lack cost details, so not fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination, transportation, accommodation, and activities. The activities include 'Yoga Retreat' (rating 10), 'Hiking Expedition' (rating 10), 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9), and 'Night Photography Tour' (rating 10).
